owner_directive.qualification_effect: The directive fixes the intended semantics but does not replace the detached OWNER receipt and out-of-band trust-anchor gate.

research_sources.finding: The article supplies qualitative pullback context only: momentum without climax, surprise, measured-move and higher-timeframe cautions. It does not specify the card's EMA, ADX, ATR, lookback, retracement, stop, target, breakeven, time-exit, Friday or news parameters.

Darwinex describes roughly 0.005% round-trip commission on Forex base-currency nominal (mathematically 0.5 basis points, not 5 basis points) and automatic account-currency conversion; spread and variable swap remain separate costs.
Darwinex Zero independently risk-adjusts the signal account; this does not excuse an unstable or unapproved signal-account risk contract.

conservative_commission_economics.legacy_label_note: Any existing artifact or directory label containing 5bp is a legacy misnomer. The applied fraction 0.00005 is 0.005%, hence 0.5 bp round trip; no economic result is rescaled.

card_semantics.finding: The numerical strategy is a QuantMechanica mechanization variant, not a verbatim source strategy. The v1 card also contradicts itself on G0 status and cannot qualify framework exits.

lineage_findings: The deployed/tested EX5 differs from the repository EX5; the selected E4 run used the deployed hash.
The repository live preset differs from the deployed/read-only preset in RISK_PERCENT (0.7500 versus 0.2007).
The v1 card does not authorize the effective Friday or news behavior.

BLOCKING_REMEDIATION_REQUIRED: the current OnTick evaluates Strategy_NewsFilterHook/QM_NewsAllowsTrade and may return before QM_FrameworkHandleFridayClose. A Friday high-impact blackout can therefore suppress the mandatory no-weekend exit. Qualification requires a new source/build in which Friday mandatory-close handling precedes every news/entry filter or an independently equivalent fail-safe path.

The old sealed reference is byte-identical to a 2026-07-12 clean-book stream produced through historical T2/Common workflow and lacks a self-contained producer receipt binding binary, preset, data and segment state. It remains audit evidence, not an admissible reference for this packet.

q08_findings.legacy_q08_error: all rows lack entry_time; the stream cannot prove full entry/exit/outcome identity

owner_gates.requirement: Create and approve a Card-v2 for QM5_10939 that labels every quantified EMA/ADX/ATR/lookback/retracement/stop/target/BE/time-exit rule as a QM interpretation rather than a source-defined rule, resolves the G0 APPROVED/PENDING contradiction, and declares all runtime dependencies and exit precedence.

OWNER's 2026-07-16 no-weekend-holdings directive fixes Friday close enabled at broker hour 21 for gap avoidance and prop preparation. Status remains OWNER_DIRECTIVE_RECORDED_UNSEALED until a detached receipt is pinned by the out-of-band trust anchor; a machine may not self-approve it.
OWNER explicitly approves or disables the effective PRE30/POST30 plus DXZ compliance axes and records calendar/staleness dependencies in Card-v2.

OWNER approves one positive percent-risk value on EUR 100,000 with RISK_FIXED=0 and PORTFOLIO_WEIGHT=1, and freezes it before reference production. Historical fixed-1000 economics and the repo 0.7500 preset cannot stand in for the observed 0.2007 contract.
OWNER names the source/include closure that Development may compile. The deployed EX5 and repo EX5 mismatch cannot be repaired by choosing the more profitable binary.

rules: Each gate has its own structured receipt; its embedded payload hash is integrity metadata, not approval authority.
approved_by must equal OWNER and decision must exactly equal the bundle gate decision.
spec_sha256 must bind this exact repair specification and approved_at_utc must parse as UTC.

Qualification requires an out-of-band OWNER trust-anchor path plus its expected file SHA-256 supplied separately to the validator; the anchor pins the exact receipt SHA-256 and decision for every gate.
The trust anchor must be outside the qualification bundle, every run/output/MT5 root, and every sealed input or reference artifact.

required_series: EURUSD.DWX account-currency conversion or an equivalently hash-bound native MT5 conversion dependency
structured_manifest_requirements: Every series binds a non-empty underlying data file and a structured series-file manifest with literal .DWX symbol, timeframe, role, record count, first/last MT5-server timestamp and READ_ONLY_DARWINEXZERO_MT5_EXPORT provenance.
A structured instrument manifest binds separate structured DarwinexZero instrument files for GBPUSD.DWX and EURUSD.DWX, including digits, point, contract size and currencies.
The structured session calendar binds both symbols, five weekly sessions and explicit DST transitions in MT5 server time.

The calendar enumerates one signed weekend-flat cutoff and the next tradable reopening for every covered Friday. Each cutoff is the earlier of Friday 21:00 broker time and the last tradable DarwinexZero session before that weekend, so holidays, extended closures and early closes fail closed.

minimum_warmup.d1_derivation: slow EMA(50); this is a hard minimum and may be raised for convergence but never reduced

segments.reason: The bounded interval is shorter than the D1 EMA(50) minimum warmup; it cannot carry economic inference through 2025-12-31.
The year-end tail is shorter than warmup and is continuity evidence only.

rules: Detect exact boundaries against the hash-bound broker session calendar and intersect host, D1 and conversion coverage.
Execute each segment in a fresh process/state domain. Do not seed indicators, rolling values, Q08 history, pending orders or positions from a prior segment.
Warmup begins after the actual post-gap first session-valid bar. The strategy must be prevented from entering during warmup.
An open position or pending order at a segment endpoint invalidates the segment. Tester-forced liquidation is not a strategy exit.
Never pool B/C/D-spanning economics. Score only the inference segments after warmup; continuity-only tails cannot rescue or reject PF.

identity_contract.canonical_stream_format: UTF-8 JSONL, one normalized round trip per row, decimal price/volume fields encoded as strings
independent_sources: Q08 emitter normalized by a Q08-specific extractor

native MT5 report semantically re-parsed by the validator with the existing MT5 round-trip parser; fields not present in standard columns use bounded MT5-comment-safe tokens QM10939E|TOKEN|SL|TP and QM10939X|TOKEN
comparison_order: Q08 versus native within each execution

requirements: The reference producer finishes and a structured reference seal binds its run ID, finish time, seal time, input-contract hash and every receipt/report/Q08/native/normalized artifact plus identity digest before either verification run starts.
All three groups use the same sealed input manifest, approved Card-v2 contract, build EX5, preset, data manifests, segment boundaries and five-axis cost contract.

Every execution receipt and the reference seal is signed by the externally supplied, hash-pinned Ed25519 OWNER qualification key; bundle/spec edits and self-rehashed SHA fields cannot bootstrap that authority.
Run IDs, execution IDs, sandbox IDs and isolation IDs are globally casefold-distinct. Output and isolated MT5 roots are globally distinct and may not equal, contain or descend from another run root.

Every generated receipt/report/Q08/normalized artifact is globally path-distinct, lies below its own output root, and never lies below a foreign root. The native report additionally lies below its own isolated MT5 root. A verification output may never be copied back as its own reference.
Control, cost, reference-seal, OWNER receipt and OWNER trust-anchor artifacts lie outside every run output and MT5 root.
The reference seal may not name itself as a sealed run artifact and may not be replaced by an empty or self-attested JSON object.
The two verification groups execute serially, collision-free, with different isolation IDs and unchanged input hashes.
All five identity digests and trade counts match exactly per segment.
Resolve all six exact fingerprints; same-symbol K bounds remain conservative audit evidence but are not an exact resolution.
Bind the native deal commission or exact base nominal, entry/exit conversion rate, account currency and rounding rule for every fingerprint.
Commission completion does not certify historical spread, current broker spread parity, current broker swap parity or adverse slippage.

canonical_standalone_commission_evidence.scope: commission baseline only; six 10939 rows remain BOUNDED_AMBIGUOUS_FAIL_CLOSED

manifest_rules: Use the hardened external DXZ execution-cost evidence manifest loader; bundle-local axis fields cannot self-attest PASS.
The manifest and immutable sidecar bind the exact source-manifest SHA-256, validation as-of timestamp, sleeve 10939:GBPUSD.DWX:H4 and exact evaluation window.
Every axis artifact and immutable sidecar must revalidate with PASS semantics; an empty JSON object is never cost evidence.

required_bindings: out-of-band OWNER trust-anchor SHA-256 (path is never bundle-supplied)
structured literal-DWX data, series-file, instrument-file, instrument and session/DST manifests
structured exact six-row commission-resolution manifest and all bound native/conversion evidence

requirements: all OWNER gates APPROVED
all machine gates PASS
all baseline and new bundle hashes verified
both inference segments non-empty and exactly identical across native/Q08/reference/two repeats
every scored trade proves flat at the earlier of Friday 21:00 broker time or the bound last tradable pre-weekend session; no weekend or holiday-gap interval is permitted
continuity segments reset-safe and identical even when empty
commission ambiguity count zero and all five externally revalidated execution-cost axes PASS
structured input and reference seals PASS with globally casefold-distinct run/output/MT5/execution/sandbox identities, collision-free generated paths and out-of-root control evidence
prohibited_claims_before_pass: PF carried forward from the pooled 92-trade baseline
